info.title: SEPM EVENTS API
info.description: Self-contained OpenAPI 2.0 specification for SEPM events endpoints.

post.operationId: Acknowledgement of Specified Risk Log Event

200.description: The web service successfully processed the web request and returned a result.

401.description: The user that is currently logged on has insufficient rights to execute the web method, or the user is unauthorized.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

500.description: The web service encountered an error while processing the web request.

post.summary: Acknowledges a specified event for a given risk log event ID.  The event must be from a command scan.

200.description: The web service successfully processed the web request and returned a result.

401.description: The user that is currently logged on has insufficient rights to execute the web method, or the user is unauthorized.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

500.description: The web service encountered an error while processing the web request.

post.summary: Acknowledges a specified event for a given event ID.

parameters.name: includeAcknowledged
parameters.description: True return all acknowledged and non acknowledged critcial events, otherwise return only non acknowledged events.

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: The index page used for returned results. Not currently used.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of results returned for each page. Not currently used.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The source from which to get information. Not currently used.

get.summary: Gets notification report html specified by its ID, it respects the type parameter and ignore the accept header

acknowledged.description: Specifies whether or not the notification has been acknowledged.

lastUpdated.description: The last time the client updated its critical event status.
